title: Expectations of stronger demand in China pushed crude oil higher
section_path: Expectations of stronger demand in China pushed crude oil higher
section_path_text: Expectations of stronger demand in China pushed crude oil higher
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Signs of improving demand boosted sentiment across commodity markets. This was aided by a reversal in the USD late in the session amid expectations of lower inflation in 2023. Image reference: 1675803537777.png | assets/2023-02-08_expectations-of-stronger-demand-in-china-pushed-crude-oil-higher_img_1675803537777_814a4eee0f03.png
Crude oil gained as Saudi Aramco's move to raise prices boosted sentiment.
